languages.title: Taal
languages.subtitle: Kies de taal die in de ganse app weurt gebruuk.
languages.noResults: Gein taole euvereinkomme mit eur zeuktoch.

phone.label: Telefoonnummer
phone.searchCountry: Zoek nao land, code of kiesveurvoogsel
phone.noCountries: Geen len euvereinkomme mit eur zeuktoch.
phone.invalid: Voer un geldig telefoonnummer in veur ut geselecteerde land.

auth.onboardingTagline: ‘n Persoonlike veiligheidsmetgezel veur de mominte tusse “Ich bin good” en “Ich höb hulp nuudig.”
auth.createSubtitle: Kies un aanmeldmethode um eur veiligheidsgrafiek te besjerme.
auth.signInFailedMessage: We kooste neet voltooie aanmelde. Controleer eur verbinding en probeer nog ummer.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: ‘n Lokale ontwikkelingssessie gebruke. Native Google Sign-In werkt in un ontwikkelingsbuild.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Koppel noe of gaon door en voeg ‘t later touw.
auth.northStarBody: De VL01 wearable kin veiligheidsstrome activere mit tikke en lang drukgebare.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Uw zachte veiligheidsmetgezel op de kaart en in oproepe.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear kin helpe mit thoesmodus, bewakermodus, noodmodus, excuusgesprekke en spraokondersteuning.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Gebruuk veur de kaart, gevaarzones, veilige aankoms en SOS context.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving vraog um locatie zodat voogde kinne begriepe boe hulp nuudig kin zien. Geer kin dit later in Insjtèllinge verandere.
permissions.notificationsBody: Ver gebruke allein meldingen veur veiligheidsvraoge, noodupdates en herinneringe die geer insjtèlt.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving gebruuk eur locatie veur de veiligheidskaart, gevaarzones, snel deile en SOS cónteks. Geer kin dit later in Insjtèllinge verandere.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving sjik incheckherinneringe, noodupdates en veiligheidsvraoge die geer heet ingesjtèld. Ver gebruke gein notificaties veur advertenties.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving gebruuk eur microfoon allein es geej un AI metgezel of veiligheidsoproep begint.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving gebruuk Bluetooth um te koppele mit NorthStar juwele, de status vaan de verbinding te leze en veiligheidsstrouminge vaan de wearable te activere.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving houdt deze flow besjikbaar vaan Instellinge en ‘t dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Kies de metgezelstum dee ‘t veiligste veult um te heure.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Deil de cónteks mit vertrouwde lui.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Vijf tikke kinne escalere nao SOS en waarsjouwinge.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Maak ‘n gracieuze reie um ‘n ongemakkelike situatie te verlaote.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Begin un real-time companion-oproep es geer ondersteuning nuudig heet.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Probeer de veiligheidsstroume in un demo mit laagdrök.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Hool de juwele in de buurt onderwieles dat ge scant.
jewelry.noDevices: Nog gein NorthStar-apparate in de buurt gevoonde.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanne koos neet beginne. Probeer nog ummer.
jewelry.scanFailed: Ver kooste gein juwele in de buurt vinde. Vink Bluetooth, houw NorthStar dich en probeer nog ‘ns.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanne koos neet beginne. Vink Bluetooth toegang aan en probeer nog ummer.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Toegang tot apparate in de buurt is oet. Laot Bluetooth toegang in Insjtellinge toe en perbeer daonao nog ummer.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar doerde te lank um te verbinde. Verplaats ‘t dichterbij en probeer ‘t nog ‘ns.
jewelry.connectFailed: Ver kooste neet verbinde mit NorthStar. Controleer of ‘t opgelaod is en in de buurt is, en probeer daan nog ‘ns.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Nog gein apparate in de buurt
jewelry.emptyMessage: Houw NorthStar opgelaod en kortbij deze tillefoon, en scan daonao weer.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Op zeuk nao NorthStar apparate in de buurt...

home.subtitle: Veiligheidsmetgezel dashboard
home.readyBody: Stum, kaart, juwele en voogde zien op ein tik weg.

map.title: Veiligheidskaart
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go veurbeeld; Mapbox weergief in un ontwikkelingsbuild.
map.updateFailed: Ver kooste eur locatie neet bijwerke. Probeer nog ummer.
map.notRequested: Toegang tot locatie is neet gevraog. Geer kin ‘t later insjtèlle via Insjtellinge.
map.permissionOff: Toegang tot locatie is oet. Sjakel ‘t in Instellinge in um de veiligheidskaart op uch te centrere.
map.timeout: Uw locatie duurt langer es verwach. Verplaats ergens mit un dudeliker signaal en probeer nog ummer.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Vertrouwde plaatse die geer opsjlaot zulle hei versjiene veur snel toegang.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.reconnect: Verbind weer mit de stum AI
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Begin de oproep of typ un beriech es geer klaor zit.

history.clearMessage: Dit verwijdert opgeslage AI bijbehurende boodsjappe vaan dit apparaat.
history.title: Gesprekgesjiedenis
history.subtitle: AI bijbehurende beriechte opgeslage op dit apparaat.
history.emptyMessage: Eur AI metgezelsgesprekke versjiene hei nao eur ierste oproep.
history.loadFailed: Ver kooste gein gesprekgesjiedenis lade. Probeer nog ummer.
history.clearFailed: Ver kooste de gespreksgesjiedenis neet wissen. Probeer nog ummer.
history.deleteFailed: Ver kooste det gesprek neet verwijdere. Probeer nog ummer.

voices.title: Mien veiligheidsoproepe
voices.subtitle: Kies de metgezelstum dee good veult um te hure.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Probeer de stum nog ‘nmaol te keze.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Dit stummonster koos neet weure afgesjpeeld. Probeer nog ummer.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Gebruik gebundelde metgezelsantwoorde es ‘t netwerk of de Hume-geloufsbrieve neet besjikbaar zien.
settings.privacyBody: Exporteer of verwijder de lokale data die op dit apparaat zien opgeslage.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Ik kin eur data noe neet exportere.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Dit verwijdert eur profiel, insjtellinge, noodcontacte, gespreksgesjiedenis, toestummingsherinneringe en lokale authenticatiesessie vaan dit apparaat.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Lokale data kin noe neet verwijdere.
settings.updateFailedMessage: Ver kooste dee veurkäör neet opsjlaon. Probeer nog ummer.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Uw sessie is nog steeds actief. Probeer nog ummer.

contacts.title: Noodkontakte
contacts.subtitle: Vertrouwde lui besjikbaar tijdens veiligheidsstrome.
contacts.name: Naam
contacts.emptyMessage: Voeg iemes toe die geer vertrouwt zodat ze klaor zien es ‘n veiligheidsstroum ze nuudig heet.
contacts.removeMessage: Dees persoen zal neet langer versjiene in eur noodhulp.
contacts.nameRequired: Voer de naam vaan ‘t kontak in.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Ver kooste dit kontak neet opsjlaon. Controleer de details en probeer nog ummer.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Ver kooste dit kontak neet eweghaole. Probeer nog ummer.

friends.title: Vrung
friends.subtitle: Voogde, verzeuke en noodgrafiek.
friends.emptyMessage: Vertrouwde vrun en voogde zulle hei versjiene zodra ze zien touwgevoog.

emergency.title: Sjpoodgeval SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escaleer allein es geer onmiddellijke ondersteuning nuudig heet.
emergency.body: Dit zal eur veiligheidsstroum op de hoogte bringe en noodkontakte veurbereide.
emergency.addContact: Voeg un noodkontak toe in Insjtellinge.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Locatie-deilingsstub is klaor. Verbind ut backend share endpoint um live links te sjikke.

capybearTap.title: Capybear kraan
capybearTap.subtitle: Dubbelk op eur NorthStar um un veiligheidssinaasappel te laote valle.

errors.voiceOffline: Ge liekes offline. Uw bericht weurt verstuurd es u weer verboonde zit.
errors.voiceQueued: Bericht opgeslage. ‘t Weurt gestuurd es de stumcompanion weer verbindt.
errors.voiceRetrying: Probeer eur bericht weer te sjikke...
errors.microphone: Veur spraakgesprekke is touwgaank tot microfoon nuudig. Geer kin ‘t in Insjtellinge insjtèlle of in plaats daovan un beriech type.
errors.billing: De online stumgezel is tijdelek neet besjikbaar. Geer kin doorgaon mit de offline metgezel.
errors.authentication: De stumgezel koos dees sessie neet verifiëre. Meld weer aan of gebruuk de offline metgezel veur noe.
errors.timeout: De stummetgezel doerde te lank um te reagere. Controleer eur verbinding en probeer nog ummer.
errors.network: Ver kooste de stumgezel neet bereike. Controleer de verbinding, probeer daan nog ‘ns of gaon door offline.
errors.genericVoice: Get heet de stumgesprek oonderbroke. Probeer nog ‘nmaol, of gaon door mit de offline metgezel.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving heet microfoontoegang nuudig veur veiligheid en AI metgezelsgesprekke.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving gebruuk eur locatie veur de veiligheidskaart en veiligheidsfuncties in de buurt.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving gebruuk Bluetooth um te verbinde mit eur NorthStar veiligheidsjuwele.
ios.NSCameraUsageDescription: VeryLoving uses the camera only to scan the one-time pairing QR code on your home robot.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Deze aanmeldoptie is in deze build neet besjikbaar.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: De demomodus gebroek allein lokale nepdata. Verbónje deensj zien neet geverifieerd en deze sessie weurt gereset es de app obbenuuts laadt.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: De verificatiecode is óngeljig of verlaope. Vraog eine nuuje code aan en probeer ’t obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Te väöl aanmeldpoginge. Wach efkes en probeer ’t daona obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: De verificatie veur ’t aanmelje doerde te lank. Controleer dien verbinding en probeer ’t obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Veer kóste de aanmelddeens neet bereike. Controleer dien verbinding en probeer ’t obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Dien sessie is verlaope. Meld dich obbenuuts aan.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: De veiligheidskaart kós neet gelaje waere. Controleer dien verbinding en probeer ’t obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: De actuele locatie is neet besjikbaar. Dien lèste opgeslage locatie van %{capturedAt} weurt getuind.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Veer kóste dien locatie neet dele. Controleer de locatietoegank en probeer ’t obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Hei is mien locatie, vasgelag op %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Hei is mien lèste opgeslage locatie, vasgelag op %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Toegank tot Bluetooth steit oet. Sjakeleer dit in bie Instèllinge en probeer ’t daona obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth steit oet. Sjakeleer ’t aan en probeer ’t daona obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth-koppeling is op dit toestel of in deze build neet besjikbaar.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Veer kóste NorthStar neet vènje. Haw ’t kortbie, controleer Bluetooth en probeer ’t obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Gein NorthStar-apparate kortbie gevónje. Haw ’t kortbie en zeuk obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Veer kóste gein verbinding make mit NorthStar. Zörg det ’t opgelaje en kortbie is en probeer ’t daona obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Veer kóste deze plaats neet opsjlaon. Probeer ’t obbenuuts.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: De telefoonkiezer is geäöpend; ’t gesprek is neet bevestigd.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: D’r waor gein naodcontact besjikbaar; d’r is neet gebeld.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: De telefoonkiezer kós neet waere geäöpend; d’r is neet gebeld.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: De lèste SOS-poging kós neet waere bevestigd.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: De sjtömpartner is noe neet besjikbaar. Probeer ’t later obbenuuts of goon door mit de offline partner.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
